title: What humility actually looks like in a man
caption:
Most men think humility means making yourself small.

It doesn't. It means seeing yourself accurately — gifted where God made you gifted, broken where you actually are broken. That's not weakness. That's the thing most men never build.

The humble man can be corrected without losing himself. He goes first into the cost without being asked. He tells the truth about where he actually is.

"God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble." — James 4:6

You can't receive what you're pretending you don't need.

Save this and send it to the man who confuses low self-esteem with holiness.

#faith #christianmen #humility #scripture #manofgod #godlymen #christianity #discipleship
